title: 2025 MediSave Bonus
text:
2025 MediSave Bonus - SupportGoWhere
2025 MediSave Bonus
Share link
Boosts healthcare savings of seniors born in 1950-1973 with lower MediSave balances.
SCHEME HIGHLIGHTS
Eligible seniors can receive one-off MediSave bonus of $500
No application needed
Collapse all sections
About this support

One-off MediSave bonus of $500 

Who is this for?

Born in 1950 to 1973  

Singapore Citizen as at 31 December 2024 and remain as a citizen 

Residing in Singapore 

Does not own more than one property 

Annual Value of home (as indicated on NRIC) as at 31 December 2024 is not more than $31,000; and 

CPF MediSave balance as at 31 December 2024 is less than $37,750 (half of the prevailing Basic Healthcare Sum in 2025) 

How to apply?

No application required.

Where can I find help?

View more details 

Hotline: 1800-222-2888

Airtime charges apply for mobile calls to 1800 service lines. Calls are free of charge only if made from regular land lines in Singapore.

Submit an enquiry

Scheme last updated 19 Nov 2025
SUPPORT RECOMMENDER
Answer a few questions to find schemes and services you may be eligible for.
Check now
